/usr/bin/cc -g -fsanitize=address CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/checksum.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/icmp.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/ipv4.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/main.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/tcp.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/tun.c.o CMakeFiles/my_program.dir/app/udp.c.o -o my_program
